title: Merge subitems and organize updates chronologically
excerpt: As a suggestion, it would be great to be able to merge subitems (tasks) into one, and have the updates move together and organized by date of update!

posts.author: Kensianlaw (julia)
posts.cookedHtml: As a suggestion, it would be great to be able to merge subitems (tasks) into one, and have the updates move together and organized by date of update!
